name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: Tomorrow Morning
body:
| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Tomorrow morning I will be giving a very important update on my 2016 plans** and I want to make sure you are able to hear it.

**I will be on _CBS This Morning_ at approximately 7am ET.**

As an announcement draws near, I need to know you stand with me. **[You can show your support by making a critical financial contribution to Security Through Strength by following this link](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27823727:26741228953:m:1:877327319:EF47CA413C8217394B2B3B59B70102A3:r)**.

Thank you for your support. I hope you will be able to tune in tomorrow morning!

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27823727:26741228953:m:1:877327319:EF47CA413C8217394B2B3B59B70102A3:r) |

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW1AeO-1zN).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW1AeO-1zN) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW1AeO-1zN)

name: survey@murphyforflorida.com
subject: Patrick needs your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| As you know, Patrick is passionate about a lot of big issues -- from championing the middle class to protecting the Everglades.Friend -- As you know, Patrick is passionate about a lot of big issues -- from championing the middle class to protecting the Everglades. But the one thing he's MOST passionate about is hearing from his supporters about the issues they care about. Patrick needs to hear from you! Will you take this one-question survey to tell Patrick the issue that matters the most to you? **Click on a link below to vote for your most important issue right now:** | | [Growing the middle class >> ](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2794/738133e4/39a56c8f/7f9ba0cf/4243833510/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/survey?sc=ema_2015-05-15_b1_tm_survey_ldnd")
---
[Strengthening Social Security and Medicare >>](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2794/738133e4/39a56c8f/7f9ba0cf/4243833510/VEsE/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/survey?sc=ema_2015-05-15_b1_tm_survey_ldnd")
[Protecting Florida's environment and precious coastline >>](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2794/738133e4/39a56c8f/7f9ba0cf/4243833510/VEsF/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/survey?sc=ema_2015-05-15_b1_tm_survey_ldnd")
[Breaking through the partisan gridlock in Washington >>](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2794/738133e4/39a56c8f/7f9ba0cf/4243833510/VEsC/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/survey?sc=ema_2015-05-15_b1_tm_survey_ldnd")
**[murphyforflorida.com/survey](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2794/738133e4/39a56c8f/7f9ba0cf/4243833510/VEsD/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/survey?sc=ema_2015-05-15_b1_tm_survey_ldnd")**
The results will help inform Team Murphy as we develop a policy agenda for the campaign trail and the Senate. Don't miss this opportunity to cast your vote.
Thanks,
Team Murphy

**[Contribute »](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-may2015?refcode=ema_2015-05-15_b1_tm_survey_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: UPDATE -- Tomorrow Morning
body:
Friend, just a quick update.

**My appearance on tomorrow's _CBS This Morning_ has been moved to 8 AM.**

I hope you will be able to tune in.

\- Lindsey | |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Tomorrow morning I will be giving a very important update on my 2016 plans** and I want to make sure you are able to hear it.

**I will be on _CBS This Morning_ at approximately 7am ET.**

As an announcement draws near, I need to know you stand with me. **[You can show your support by making a critical financial contribution to Security Through Strength by following this link](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27825783:26743329294:m:1:877327319:763A3447AEB446E7C581CD4D323C11D0:r)**.

Thank you for your support. I hope you will be able to tune in tomorrow morning!

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

name: Marlon Marshall, Hillary for America
subject: Tuesday: Join us in Virginia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Are you ready to kick things off? | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI2NjQ4ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxNjQxMTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --
Arlington is pumped -- and you should be, too! Folks in Virginia have been on a roll signing up volunteers and building support for Hillary, and there are no signs of letting up.

We're ready to start organizing in Arlington, but it won't be a real success unless we have our best supporters like you there.

So come and meet fellow volunteers of the Hillary for America team in Virginia, and have a great time while you do it.

**[Check out the details, RSVP, and then mark your calendar for a great time organizing with other supporters:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI2NjQ4ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxNjQxMTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)****WHAT: **Grassroots Organizing Meeting**
WHEN: **Tuesday, May 19th, 2015
6:00 p.m. - 8:00 p.m.**
WHERE: **2424 Wilson Boulevard
Arlington, Virginia 22201**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI2NjQ4ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxNjQxMTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
Once you RSVP, spread the word! This is going to be a great time for new supporters, family, and friends -- so be sure to forward this email and bring the whole crew:

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/events/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI2NjQ4ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxNjQxMTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Have fun,

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of State Campaigns and Political Engagement
Hillary for America [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI2NjQ4ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxNjQxMTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI2NjQ4ODYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYxNjQxMTMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
